ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MORTGAGE MARKET INFORMATION SERVICES
FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT GURVICH, EDWARD GUARANTOR HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFT. EDWARD GURVICH'S FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT - DENIED -- INADEQUATE EXPLANATION FOR FAILURE TO ANSWER AND FOR DELAY IN BRINGING MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFUALT. MOTION TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 918. STAY TO EXPIRE ON FILING OF NOTICE OF APPEAL. JUDGE ROBERTSON, REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH, #1193 (301) (AJR/JK-X)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant EDWARD GURVICH in propria persona and moving party
* Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant EDWARD GURVICH's motion to vacate default judgment denied -- inadequate explanation for failure to answer and for delay in bringing motion to set aside default. Motion to stay enforcement of judgment granted pursuant to CCP 918. Stay to expire on filing of notice of appeal. (AJR/JK-X) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
